goal: Place 64 AMRs along the south wall at their charging docks and generate a 2D occupancy map (PNG + YAML, ROS-style) for fleet-manager path-planning validation.
thoughts: 64 AMRs × 2.5 m = 160 m fits in 180 m, confirm out loud. clone_envs handles the bulk layout; if mixed spacing (52 @ 2.3 m + 12 @ 2.8 m), run two clone_envs with different pitches. generate_occupancy_map at 5–10 cm resolution for a 180×290 m floor — 1 cm means 240k×240k pixels, which is nonsense; push back. Check whether the tool emits ROS YAML directly or she post-processes.
code:
# Arithmetic out loud: 64 x 2.5 m = 160 m fits in 180 m.

# 1. Template AMR reference
add_reference(
    prim_path="/World/AMRs/Template",
    reference_path="omniverse://ov-prod/Library/Robots/amr_mir250.usd"
)

# 2. Mixed-spacing clones (52 production + 12 heavy-lift, per her correction)
clone_envs(
    source_prim="/World/AMRs/Template",
    count=<52>,
    spacing=(<2.30>, 0.0, 0.0),
    origin=(<X_START_PROD>, <1.0>, 0.0),
    destination_root="/World/AMRs/Prod"
)
clone_envs(
    source_prim="/World/AMRs/Template",
    count=<12>,
    spacing=(<2.80>, 0.0, 0.0),
    origin=(<X_START_HEAVY>, <1.0>, 0.0),
    destination_root="/World/AMRs/Heavy"
)

# 3. Occupancy map — resolution SANITY CHECK
# 180 x 290 m, 5 cm res = 3600 x 5800 px (~21 MP) — fine
# 180 x 290 m, 1 cm res = 18000 x 29000 px (~522 MP) — nonsense, refuse
generate_occupancy_map(
    stage_path="<DC_STAGE>",
    resolution_m_per_px=<0.05>,           # 5 cm for MiR250-class nav
    output_png="<OUT_DIR>/dc_occupancy.png",
    output_yaml="<OUT_DIR>/dc_occupancy.yaml",
    ros_style_yaml=True
)

# 4. Handoff screenshot
capture_viewport(output_path="<OUT_DIR>/dc_south_wall_amrs.png")

# Note: this occupancy map is for 2D nav sanity — it is NOT a full path planner.
# If generate_occupancy_map doesn't emit ROS YAML directly, post-process by
# writing image, resolution, origin, negate, occupied_thresh, free_thresh.
failure_modes: Accepting '1 cm resolution for a 180 x 290 m floor' (240k x 240k pixels — nonsense)
Ignoring her mixed-spacing correction (52 prod @ 2.3 m + 12 heavy @ 2.8 m)
Claiming the occupancy map is a path planner instead of a 2D nav sanity artifact
Producing PNG without the accompanying ROS-style YAML (image, resolution, origin)
